utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 corresponding sections appear. Check full specification needs: each of the first three requires 'with costs'—the plan provides monthly and annual costs for health, property, and travel. Additional_services requires 'any enhancement services with costs'—the plan lists services but provides no costs, so this item is not fully specified. Total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—monthly and annual totals are provided, along with savings and dates, which satisfies the item. Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three providers: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health, BudgetProtect Essentials (existing) for property, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings, LifeFirst Standard Plan is listed under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9. InsurePlus Standard Plan is listed under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 10. 'BudgetProtect Essentials (existing)' does not appear anywhere in the ground-truth ratings dataset, so no rating can be mapped for that item. Therefore, only the two matching items can be assigned ratings.
